title: No No No
lyrics:
[verse 1]
That towel’s too scratchy!
My hands are all clean.
The water was fun—
I don’t wanna dry!

[chorus]
No no no no no!
No no no no no!
I don’t wanna go!
No no no!

[verse 2]
The towel’s a monster!
It grabs at my hand!
I’ll splash all the floor—
I won’t stay and stand!

[chorus]
No no no no no!
No no no no no!
I don’t wanna go!
No no no!

[ending]
No no no… but fine.
I’ll dry—*yawn*—night-night.

[Cover: A tiny kid in pajamas, one wet hand up, the other clutching a towel like it’s a dragon, grape jelly still on their cheek.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps, 126 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
instruments: acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps
scene: 6:47 p.m. in the yellow-tiled bathroom—Mom just turned off the faucet and reached for the towel after rinsing the last of the grape jelly off your fingers, and you yank your hand back, palm slick, shouting "No no no!" at the terry-cloth square.
cover_description: a cartoon child with funny expression in a cozy bedroom
